ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Customer reports unauthorized account access with $127 in fraudulent charges. Agent locks account and initiates investigation to reverse transactions.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: Someone accessed my account without permission.
Agent: This is very concerning. Let me secure your account immediately.
Customer: I noticed charges I didn't make.
Agent: I've temporarily locked your account. We'll need to verify your identity.
Customer: What charges were made?
Agent: There are three unauthorized transactions totaling $127. We'll investigate and reverse them.
